basic_details.organization_name: Kalyan Singh Super Specialty Cancer Institute (KSSSCI)
basic_details.short_information: Kalyan Singh Super Specialty Cancer Institute (KSSSCI) Senior Resident (Hospital Services) Notification 2026 has been released on 01 July 2026 on the official website of KSSSCI. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the KSSSCI Senior Resident (Hospital Services) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation to SC/ST/OBC/Govt. servants/other categories as per UP Government rules/DoPT rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/DNB (Pathology), MD Anaesthesia/ Medicine/Resp. Med/ Emergency Medicine
qualification.details: Senior Resident (IHS) - Pathology & Cancer Genetics: MD/DNB (Pathology) Senior Resident (IHS) - Critical Care Medicine: MD Anaesthesia/ Medicine/Resp. Med/ Emergency Medicine

salary_details.details: Rs. 67,700/- Per Month (for Senior Resident (IHS) - Pathology & Cancer Genetics) Rs. 67,700/- Per Month (for Senior Resident (IHS) - Critical Care Medicine)

rows.kalyan_singh_super_specialty_cancer_inst: MD/DNB (Pathology), MD Anaesthesia/ Medicine/Resp. Med/ Emergency Medicine

content_sections.heading: KSSSCI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the KSSSCI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download KSSSCI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: KSSSCI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Senior Resident (IHS) - Pathology & Cancer Genetics: MD/DNB (Pathology) Senior Resident (IHS) - Critical Care Medicine: MD Anaesthesia/ Medicine/Resp. Med/ Emergency Medicine

content_sections.heading: KSSSCI Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation to SC/ST/OBC/Govt. servants/other categories as per UP Government rules/DoPT rules.

content_sections.heading: KSSSCI Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 67,700/- Per Month (for Senior Resident (IHS) - Pathology & Cancer Genetics) Rs. 67,700/- Per Month (for Senior Resident (IHS) - Critical Care Medicine)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for KSSSCI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KSSSCI Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview, and the specific date for the interview is 07-07-2026. Candidates should ensure they attend the interview on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: For Pathology & Cancer Genetics, MD/DNB (Pathology) is required. For Critical Care Medicine, MD Anaesthesia/ Medicine/Resp. Med/ Emergency Medicine is needed.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per UP Government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 67,700/- per month for both Senior Resident positions.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Senior Resident (Hospital Services) posts.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for KSSSCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the KSSSCI located?
faq.answer: Kalyan Singh Super Specialty Cancer Institute (KSSSCI) is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 226002.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type for these Senior Resident posts is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.
